display.purpose: Page titles and dashboard headings. One per view.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, table cells.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, navigation items.

micro.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, status labels, table headers.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and card-hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action button. Used once per view for the main action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #1A56A0; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0F3B73; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1A56A0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis button for secondary or grouped actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #475569; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F1F5F9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1A56A0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Standard card container for dashboard widgets and content panels.
components.html:
Recent Activity

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #0F172A; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { } .ds-card-text { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: #0F172A; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #0F172A; } .ds-input { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: #0F172A; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 10px 14px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #475569; opacity: 0.6; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #1A56A0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(26 86 160 / 0.2); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: #991B1B; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Status indicator badge for operational states.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-active { background: rgb(22 101 52 / 0.1); color: #166534; } .ds-badge-warning { background: rgb(194 65 12 / 0.1); color: #C2410C; } .ds-badge-error { background: rgb(153 27 27 / 0.1); color: #991B1B; } .ds-badge-info { background: rgb(37 99 235 / 0.1); color: #2563EB; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.html: DashboardTrips
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: rgb(15 23 42 / 0.6); text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #F1F5F9; color: #0F172A; } .ds-nav-active { box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 0 #1A56A0; background: rgb(26 86 160 / 0.08); color: #1A56A0; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; color: inherit; opacity: 0.6; } .ds-nav-active svg { opacity: 1; color: #1A56A0; }

narrative.overview:
BusTrack is a professional-grade admin interface for managing school bus operations. It prioritises clarity, predictability, and operational awareness. The system feels like a well-organised control room — every surface has a purpose, every status is readable at a glance, and navigation is effortless.

This system explicitly rejects decorative excess: no glassmorphism, no gradient text, no playful illustrations. Visual interest comes from thoughtful spacing, consistent colour cues, and purposeful micro-interactions. The admin should never wonder what something means or where to click next — the interface guides without calling attention to itself.
keyCharacteristics: Reliable colour semantics (green = good, amber = caution, red = error)

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Orange appears on no more than 5% of any screen. Its scarcity guarantees its attention-getting power.

rules.name: The Semantic-First Rule
rules.body: Never use a colour decoratively when a semantic colour exists. Success is always green, errors always red, regardless of brand aesthetics.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: One typeface across all roles. Hierarchy is expressed through weight and size, not font switching.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction state (hover, active, elevated).

dos: Use Signal Blue for all primary actions. One primary action per view.
Use the status colour mapping consistently: green for active/complete, amber for warnings, red for errors.
Keep body text at Deep Ink (not Mid Ink) to maintain ≥4.5:1 contrast.
Use t-display for page titles and t-h1 through t-h3 for section hierarchy.
Prefer the four-level shadow vocabulary over ad-hoc shadow values.
Keep cards flat with a single border — avoid border-left accent stripes.
Nest card elements directly (no nested cards) — use gap or internal sections instead.
donts: Use orange/accent decoratively — its role is attention-getting, never decorative.
Use gradient text, glassmorphism, or hand-drawn SVG illustrations.
Add shadows to cards that already have a border — pick one.
Use border-radius larger than 16px on cards or sections (pill shapes are for badges only).
Use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) or all-caps eyebrow labels above every section.
Animate layout properties (width, height, top, left) — use transform and opacity only.
Skip reduced-motion: every animation needs a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) fallback.
Use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px) as decorative accents on cards or alerts.
